issues.title: Blueprint IR types + fact extractors (Hono/Supabase/Zod)
issues.body:
## Intent
Neutrale Blueprint-IR (Facts, Concepts, Findings) und regex/line-basierte Fact-Extractors für Hono-Routes, Supabase DB-Zugriffe, Zod-Validation und Auth-Muster.

## User Journey
1. Entwickler startet Blueprint-Scan
2. Engine extrahiert harte Facts aus TS/JS-Dateien
3. Facts landen in BlueprintDocument

## Problem
Keine Fact Engine; FlowService mischt UI-Flows mit technischen Signalen.

## Solution
`module/blueprint/dto`, `facts/fact-extractors.ts`, `graph/import-resolver.ts`

## Runtime
| Axis | This slice |
|------|------------|
| GitHub Edge | yes |
| Local Runner | partial (types shared later) |

## Edge Cases
- Datei parse error → skip file, log warn
- Keine Routes → leeres routes[]

## Acceptance
- [ ] CodeFact mit filePath, line, snippet, kind
- [ ] Hono app.get/post erkannt
- [ ] supabase.from().insert erkannt
- [ ] safeParse erkannt

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/blueprint-engine-v1.md`

## Runner
Feature slug: `blueprint-engine-core`

issues.title: POST /blueprint/analyze endpoint + BlueprintAnalysisService
issues.body:
## Intent
Separater Blueprint-Scan-Endpoint; GitHub tree + priorisierte Dateien → BlueprintDocument.

## Acceptance
- [ ] POST /visudev-analyzer/blueprint/analyze
- [ ] Response { success, data: BlueprintDocument }
- [ ] Route-first file prioritization

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/blueprint-engine-v1.md`

issues.title: Concept + Policy engine (core security rules)
issues.body:
## Intent
Facts → Concepts (Validation confirmed/missing) → Findings via Policy-Regeln.

## Acceptance
- [ ] validation-before-db-write Rule
- [ ] Finding mit evidenceFactIds + confidence
- [ ] SecurityMatrix rows generiert

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/blueprint-engine-v1.md`

issues.title: Blueprint scan wiring in store + KV persist
issues.body:
## Intent
startScan('blueprint') ruft /blueprint/analyze; Ergebnis via blueprintAPI.update.

## Acceptance
- [ ] Blueprint-Scan ≠ App-Flow-Scan
- [ ] blueprint:{projectId} in KV nach Scan

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/blueprint-engine-v1.md`

issues.title: Security Matrix + Finding Inspector UI
dependsOn: Blueprint scan wiring in store + KV persist
issues.body:
## Intent
Tabellarische Route × Controls Übersicht; Inspector mit Evidence.

## Acceptance
- [ ] Matrix zeigt Routes aus BlueprintDocument
- [ ] Klick öffnet Inspector mit Rule ID + Snippet

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/blueprint-engine-v1.md`

issues.title: Route Blueprint Canvas (linear pipeline per route)
issues.body:
## Intent
Visuelle Pipeline: Request → Auth → Validation → Handler → DB pro selektierter Route.

## Acceptance
- [ ] Canvas aktualisiert bei Matrix-Zeilenwahl
- [ ] Node-Farben nach ConceptState

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/blueprint-engine-v1.md`

issues.title: Local Blueprint Runner + project local_path
issues.body:
## Intent
Lokale Projekte aus 2-DEV-PROJEKTE scannen ohne GitHub.

## Acceptance
- [ ] source_mode github|local auf Project
- [ ] Runner liest local_path, PUT blueprint KV

## Design
Epic: `.qa/design/blueprint-engine-v1.md`
